title: polygala pterocarpa
intro: Polygala pterocarpa, also known as Chinese falcon plum or polygala root, is a plant species that belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala pterocarpa include improved cardiovascular health, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced immune function. It is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in capsule or tablet form, making it a popular herbal remedy in East Asian medicine.
